entry.title: New: Bill 50 (Hawaiʻi County) — Adopted
entry.content:
AMENDS CHAPTER 19, ARTICLE 11, SECTION 19-90, OF THE HAWAIʻI COUNTY CODE 1983 (2016 EDITION, AS AMENDED), RELATING TO REAL PROPERTY TAXES

Changes the required appropriation of residential tier two property tax revenue for housing and homelessness from a fixed proportion of 75 percent to a fixed amount of $9,000,000.

Latest action: Council: Bill 50, Draft 2 passes second & final reading - 06/04/25

View on the council site
